response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video: 00:00-02:57 is a conversational intro from VTuber Tokino Sora at her concert 'Dreams in Motion'. 2. response.global_summary: This video is a free streaming preview of the Tokino Sora New Year's Party 2026 'Dreams in Motion' concert held on January 10, 2026. The video features Tokino Sora interacting with her audience ('Sora-tomo') at the Tokyo International Forum Hall A, followed by a short musical dance performance towards the end of the free streaming portion.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora is interacting with the audience at the 'Dreams in Motion' concert. She asks the audience for their penlight colors, talks about them being the main characters, and mentions the streaming portion of the event. Background music is playing but no vocal music.
Tokino Sora begins a vocal musical dance performance. The music is an upbeat, electronic-style pop song. The performance continues until the end of the free streaming segment.
